metadata.note: Sub-case A2: the toponym IS the gate. primary_target left NULL and centroid_ids widened to {ASIA-INDIA, ASIA-PAKISTAN} because only 48 of 107 Kashmir titles carry the Pakistan centroid -- an AND-gate would delete more than half the phenomenon. Territorial/sovereignty scope only; the Pahalgam attack and Operation Sindoor live on india_pakistan_militancy. Pre-audited 2026-07-17. DROPPED: 'ceasefire violation' (matched Lebanon/Israel/Iran ceasefires -- Pakistan commenting on the Middle East, 0/3 on-topic); 'statehood' (redundant, every hit already carries J&K); 'Uri' (word-START match would catch Uribe/urine for 1 title); 'Line of Control' n=0; 'LoC' banned -- lowercase 'o' dodges the acronym path so it word-STARTs into local/location (182 false hits). Dead: PoJK, plebiscite, Hurriyat, Siachen, Kupwara, Baramulla. 'PoK' kept at 24/25 (one 'Bangla Pokkho' leak).

bundle.term: The disputed territory and its sub-geography
Constitutional / legal status of the territory
